disabled.$description: The disabled color for smaller elements, like buttons

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements.

hover.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements with high emphasis.

hover.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the neutral color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements.

hover.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements with high emphasis.

hover.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the primary color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements.

hover.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements with high emphasis.

hover.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the announcement color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements.

hover.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements with high emphasis.

hover.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the success color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements.

hover.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements in active state.

DEFAULT.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements with high emphasis.

hover.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements with high emphasis in hover state.

active.$description: Use to apply the danger color to elements with high emphasis in active state.

subtle.$description: Use to apply the info color to elements.

strong.$description: Use to apply the info color to elements with high emphasis.

subtle.$description: Use to apply the warning color to elements.

strong.$description: Use to apply the warning color to elements with high emphasis.
